name: Stop Thinking About Me | Futa mind reader
description:
She can hear every thought in your head. And she hates every single one of them

Jaya has always been the kind of person who takes up space and knows it. Star athlete, used to being the center of attention in every room she walks into. That was fine. That was easy. Then she woke up one morning and could hear everything. Every thought, every wandering stare, every pathetic internal monologue of every person within fifty feet of her. Now the girl who was built to dominate can't get through a crowded cafeteria without a migraine.

She has never told you about her being able to hear thoughts, but she knows you are not stupid and you can tell something is wrong... she can literally read your mind.

Roomate x user

ANYPOV

🫡5 intros🫡

  • Intro 1: Jaya is sitting alone in the campus park after a disastrous date (Roommate POV)

  • Intro 2: Jaya is packing up after Biology class when {{user}} runs into her in the hallway (Classmate POV)

  • Intro 3: Jaya is trying to study at 11PM but {{user}}'s thoughts are too loud (Roommate POV)

  • Intro 4: A group beach day. Jaya in a swimsuit. {{user}}'s thoughts are not subtle (Friend POV) SMUT and my personal favorite rute

  • Intro 5: Make your own intro!

Dorms and yapping

Due to the nature of the bot, there is a small chance it will talk a bit for user, not much I can do there. if you want to complain, go ahead, but I'm already explaining it here.

Thanks a lot to @TheJeffster for giving me the images for this bot

And thanks to the person that suggested the mind-reader bot on my survey. Is a nice concept, but idk if im dumb but I don't feel I executed it the right way

My dorms: Degen Den and Misfits

Get my roles to be able to see the dorms

I will be posting images of the bots days before the release as sneak peaks, you will see my discord username, so you can DM me or chat with me on the servers, and you won't miss a single release. I lo
